RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0016 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Liam Brown Date of Birth: 01/07/1977 SSN (tokenized): TKN-389099 Annual Income: $162,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $52,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Dublin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN74982AL BMW Model 3 2022 EV Used 40,000 VIN98533AL Tesla Elantra 2021 ICE CPO 49,000 Authorized Signature: Liam Brown
